rishikesh-riverside-camping-package-1n-2.name: Rishikesh Riverside Camping Package – 1 Night 2 Days
rishikesh-riverside-camping-package-1n-2.tagline: Riverside camping with AC & Non-AC cottages, pool, bonfire & DJ night
rishikesh-riverside-camping-package-1n-2.group_size: Suitable for couples, families & large groups (up to 150 guests)
booking_notes: No age restriction – suitable for all
Music allowed till 10:00 PM only
Swimming pool operational from 08:00 AM to 08:00 PM
Bonfire subject to weather conditions
Advance booking recommended during weekends & holidays
Government ID mandatory for all guests

itinerary.title: Arrival at Riverside Camp & Leisure Activities
itinerary.description: Arrive at the riverside campsite near Rishikesh by 11:00 AM. Check-in and welcome. Enjoy lunch followed by leisure time, swimming pool access, riverside relaxation, evening snacks, music till 10 PM, and dinner. Overnight stay at the camp.

itinerary.title: Morning Views, Breakfast & Departure
itinerary.description: Wake up early to enjoy mountain and river views. Morning tea followed by buffet breakfast. Free time for relaxation. Check-out by 10:00 AM. Optional river rafting available nearby at Shivpuri.

inclusions: Comfortable bedding with mattress and blankets
Morning tea & Buffet Breakfast on Day 02
Free access to swimming pool (08 AM – 08 PM)
exclusions: Transportation to and from the campsite

faqs.q: What are the check-in and check-out timings?
faqs.a: Check-in time is 11:00 AM and check-out time is 10:00 AM.

faqs.q: Does the campsite have a swimming pool?
faqs.a: Yes, the campsite has a swimming pool accessible from 08:00 AM to 08:00 PM.

faqs.q: Is river rafting included?
faqs.a: River rafting is not included but can be booked separately nearby.

faqs.q: Is the campsite safe for families and couples?
faqs.a: Yes, the campsite is safe for families, couples, and groups. On-site staff are available and safety guidelines are followed.

faqs.q: What meals are included in the package?
faqs.a: The package includes buffet lunch (Day 1), evening snacks with tea, buffet dinner (veg and non-veg), morning tea, and buffet breakfast (Day 2).

faqs.q: How far is the campsite from the main road and highway?
faqs.a: The campsite is approximately 1 km from the highway and requires a short uphill walk of about 10 meters from the road.

faqs.q: Is music allowed at night at the campsite?
faqs.a: Yes, music is allowed at the campsite until 10:00 PM. Loud music after this time is not permitted to maintain a peaceful environment.

faqs.q: Is parking available at the campsite?
faqs.a: Yes, free parking is available at the campsite for guests. The campsite is accessible by car and tempo traveller.

faqs.q: Do the camps have attached washrooms?
faqs.a: Yes, all camps and rooms at the campsite come with clean and well-maintained attached washroom facilities.

faqs.q: How much advance payment is required to confirm the booking?
faqs.a: A minimum advance payment of 30% of the total package amount is required to confirm the booking. The remaining balance must be paid in cash at the time of check-in.

seo.meta_title: Rishikesh Riverside Camping – 1 Night 2 Days | Pool & Bonfire ₹1499
seo.meta_description: Book riverside camping in Rishikesh with swimming pool, bonfire, DJ night, meals and mountain views. Starting ₹1499 per person.

exclusions: River rafting and other adventure activities
Transportation to and from the campsite
Any extra meals not mentioned in inclusions

itinerary.title: Arrival at Riverside Camp & Evening Bonfire
itinerary.description: Arrive at the riverside campsite in Shivpuri by 11:00 AM. Check-in to your alpine tent and relax by the river while enjoying mountain views. In the evening, enjoy tea & snacks followed by bonfire and music night (till 10:00 PM). Dinner will be served at the campsite.

meals.snacks: Evening vegetarian snacks with tea (05:30 PM – 06:30 PM)

itinerary.title: Morning Views, Breakfast & Departure
itinerary.description: Wake up to fresh mountain air and peaceful riverside views. Breakfast will be served at the campsite. After breakfast, check-out by 10:00 AM.

faqs.q: Is this camp suitable for couples and families?
faqs.a: Yes, the camp is suitable for couples, families, friends groups, and college groups.

faqs.q: Are attached washrooms available?
faqs.a: No, the camp provides clean and well-maintained common washroom facilities.

faqs.q: What meals are included in the package?
faqs.a: The package includes evening tea & snacks, buffet vegetarian dinner, and buffet vegetarian breakfast.

faqs.q: Is river rafting included in this package?
faqs.a: No, river rafting is not included but can be arranged separately.

faqs.q: What are the check-in and check-out timings?
faqs.a: Check-in is at 11:00 AM and check-out is at 10:00 AM.

malakunti-adventure-activity-camp-with-p.name: Malakunti Adventure Activity Camp with Pool – 1 Night 2 Days
malakunti-adventure-activity-camp-with-p.tagline: Adventure Camp with Pool, 3 Meals & 10+ Activities
malakunti-adventure-activity-camp-with-p.description: Experience an exciting 1 Night 2 Days adventure camp in Malakunti, Rishikesh including 3 delicious meals and evening snacks. Enjoy swimming pool access and thrilling activities like skywalk, tyre walk, burma bridge, archery, shooting, badminton, and volleyball. Evening bonfire and music from 7:00 PM to 10:00 PM.
malakunti-adventure-activity-camp-with-p.group_size: Suitable for couples, families, school groups & corporate outings
booking_notes: All activities subject to weather conditions
Music allowed till 10:00 PM only
Swimming pool operational from 08:00 AM to 08:00 PM
Government ID mandatory for all guests
Advance booking recommended during weekends
exclusions: Transportation to and from the campsite
Any additional activities not mentioned in inclusions

itinerary.title: Arrival, Adventure Activities & Bonfire Night
itinerary.description: Arrive at the Malakunti adventure camp by 11:00 AM and complete check-in. Enjoy lunch and spend the afternoon enjoying adventure activities including skywalk, tyre walk, burma bridge, archery, shooting, badminton, and volleyball. Relax in the swimming pool. In the evening, enjoy tea & snacks followed by bonfire and music night (7 PM – 10 PM). Dinner will be served at the campsite.

itinerary.title: Morning Breakfast & Departure
itinerary.description: Wake up to fresh mountain air and enjoy breakfast at the campsite. Guests can relax in the open green area or use the swimming pool during operational hours. Check-out by 10:00 AM.

faqs.q: What is included in the ₹1399 package?
faqs.a: The package includes 1 night stay, 3 vegetarian meals, evening tea & snacks, swimming pool access, adventure activities, and bonfire with music.

faqs.q: Are all adventure activities included?
faqs.a: Yes, all listed camp activities are included in the package cost.

faqs.q: Is the swimming pool included?
faqs.a: Yes, swimming pool access is included and operational from 08:00 AM to 08:00 PM.

faqs.q: Are meals vegetarian or non-vegetarian?
faqs.a: The standard package includes vegetarian meals. Non-vegetarian options may be available at additional cost.

faqs.q: Is transportation included?
faqs.a: No, transportation to and from the campsite is not included.

faqs.q: What are the check-in and check-out timings?
faqs.a: Check-in is at 11:00 AM and check-out is at 10:00 AM.

aureva-riverside-luxe-retreat.name: Aureva Riverside Luxe Retreat
aureva-riverside-luxe-retreat.tagline: Ultra-Luxury Dome Stay by the Riverside
aureva-riverside-luxe-retreat.description: A premium riverside luxury dome stay with AC & non-AC cottages, private balconies, swimming pool, bonfire nights and scenic Himalayan views.
booking_notes: Valid ID proof required at check-in
Bonfire & DJ till 10:00 PM
River rafting available at extra cost
Early check-in subject to availability

itinerary.title: Arrival • Leisure Activities • Bonfire & DJ Night
itinerary.description: Arrive at the luxury camp and enjoy a welcome drink. Check into your AC or Non-AC cottage with attached washroom. Enjoy swimming pool access, indoor & outdoor games, riverside walk and free Wi-Fi. Evening snacks followed by bonfire and DJ night. Buffet dinner and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Morning Leisure • Breakfast • Checkout
itinerary.description: Wake up to scenic Himalayan views. Enjoy tea/coffee and leisure time.

faqs.q: Is this camp suitable for couples and families?
faqs.a: Yes, the camp is ideal for couples, families, groups, and corporate outings.

faqs.q: Are AC and Non-AC cottages available?
faqs.a: Yes, both AC and Non-AC luxury cottages are available with attached washrooms.

faqs.q: Do you have a swimming pool?
faqs.a: Yes, a well-maintained swimming pool is available during operational hours.

faqs.q: Is bonfire and DJ night included?
faqs.a: Yes, bonfire with music is included. DJ night is organised on selected days.

faqs.q: Is parking available?
faqs.a: Yes, free and secure parking is available inside the property.

faqs.q: Is Wi-Fi available?
faqs.a: Complimentary Wi-Fi is available in common areas.

faqs.q: What is the check-in and check-out time?
faqs.a: Check-in starts from 02:00 PM and check-out is by 11:00 AM.
